commentary_templates.Material Inward: Raw materials are being received/awaited. Delays here cascade. Verify vendor shipping.
commentary_templates.Cutting: Fabric cutting in progress. Monitor utilization rates and cutting tickets.
commentary_templates.Sewing: Garment assembly underway. Line balancing and WIP flow are critical.
commentary_templates.Washing: Chemical processing/drying phase. Monitor batch completion.
commentary_templates.Finishing: Pressing, trimming, labeling. Ensure trims are available.
commentary_templates.Quality Check: Inspection underway. Defects will cause rework. Monitor AQL results.
commentary_templates.Packing: Final stage. Check barcoding and shipping docs.
